Tests the behavior of Math.atan with an object input to ensure it returns NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan` function when it receives an object as an argument. The `assert` function checks if the result of `Math.atan({})` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number), which is the expected outcome when `Math.atan` is given a non-numeric input. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific test case for the `Math.atan` method in JavaScript.
